brief_html: Response to a clan change chieftain request.
remarks_html:
Response to a clan change chieftain request.

Status is one of the Clan Message Codes:

  • 0x00: Successfully changed chieftain
  • 0x02: Too soon because the clan is not old enough or the target user has not been a member long enough (must be one week old), or the chieftain was changed too recently
  • 0x07: Not authorized because you are not the leader
  • 0x08: Not allowed

comments.content_html: FooLOps 1.9.9 does not handle this packet. When you attempt to make someone a Chieftain, look at the last byte for success/fail and compare it to the Clan Message Codes under Related.
